# Wire — Pipe — cache-aside

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in
> [`test/stories/wire_pipe_cache_aside_story_test.exs`](../../../echo/apps/echo_mq/test/stories/wire_pipe_cache_aside_story_test.exs). Every scenario below is a passing
> ExUnit test driving the real `EchoMQ` surface against Valkey, so the catalogue cannot

**1 scenario.**

## Scenario: a value written with a TTL is read back, and its expiry is live

- **Given** an empty cache key
- **When** one pipe sets the value with a 60s TTL, reads it, and consults the TTL
- **Then** the set acknowledges, the read returns the seeded value, and the TTL is positive
